response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and has no demonstrable experience with large-scale cloud compute infrastructure, distributed systems, or technical leadership in cloud platforms — key pillars of the role. Their background is heavily focused on web, mobile, and open-source tooling using JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, with minimal evidence of C++ in recent roles and no leadership in cloud architecture or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and domains
Proven experience in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to build and deploy scalable systems (e.g., Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience documented; far below the 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or large-scale infrastructure design
Lacks documented experience mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers or owning ambiguous cloud projects
